manager.title: Adapter Manager
manager.install_dialog_desc: Install an adapter package to extend model support.
manager.path_hint: Absolute path to the adapter package directory.
manager.no_external_desc: Install an adapter package to extend model support.
manager.alpha_desc: The adapter runtime and API surface are still changing. Expect breaking changes while this feature settles.
manager.reinstall_dialog_desc: This will pull the latest version of {{package}} from npm and hot-swap the running adapter module. Existing agents will use the new version on their next run.
manager.remove_dialog_desc: Are you sure you want to remove the {{type}} adapter? It will be unregistered and removed from the adapter store.
manager.remove_dialog_npm_cleanup: npm packages will be cleaned up from disk.

claude_local.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the system prompt at runtime.

codex_local.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the system prompt at runtime. Note: Codex may still auto-apply repo-scoped AGENTS.md files from the workspace.
codex_local.fast_mode_manual: Fast mode will be passed through for this manual model. If Codex rejects it, turn the toggle off.
codex_local.fast_mode_supported: Fast mode consumes credits/tokens much faster than standard Codex runs.
codex_local.fast_mode_unsupported: Fast mode currently only works on {{models}} or manual model IDs. Paperclip will ignore this toggle until the model is switched.

cursor.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the prompt at runtime.

gemini_local.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Prepended to the Gemini prompt at runtime.

hermes_local.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the system prompt at runtime.

openclaw.device_auth_desc: Always enabled for gateway agents. Paperclip persists a device key during onboarding so pairing approvals remain stable across runs.

opencode_local.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the system prompt at runtime.

pi_local.instructions_file_hint: Absolute path to a markdown file (e.g. AGENTS.md) that defines this agent's behavior. Injected into the system prompt at runtime.

path_instructions.title: How to get a full path
path_instructions.mac_step_1: Open Finder and navigate to the folder.
path_instructions.mac_step_3: Hold the Option (⌥) key — "Copy" changes to "Copy as Pathname".
path_instructions.mac_step_4: Click "Copy as Pathname", then paste here.
path_instructions.mac_tip: You can also open Terminal, type cd, drag the folder into the terminal window, and press Enter. Then type pwd to see the full path.
path_instructions.windows_step_1: Open File Explorer and navigate to the folder.
path_instructions.windows_step_2: Click in the address bar at the top — the full path will appear.
path_instructions.windows_step_3: Copy the path, then paste here.
path_instructions.windows_tip: Alternatively, hold Shift and right-click the folder, then select "Copy as path".
path_instructions.linux_step_1: Open a terminal and navigate to the directory with cd.
path_instructions.linux_step_2: Run pwd to print the full path.
path_instructions.linux_step_3: Copy the output and paste here.
path_instructions.linux_tip: In most file managers, Ctrl+L reveals the full path in the address bar.
